headline: Amazon's Logistics Bombshell Just Crashed Dow Transports Into A Bear Market
summary: Dow Transports plunge into bear market as Amazon Supply Chain Services hammers FedEx, UPS and CHRW. Is this a "watershed moment?"

headline: UPS, FedEx stocks sink after Amazon expands logistics network to other businesses
summary: UPS and FedEx stocks sank Monday after Amazon announced it was opening up its supply chain network to outside companies.

headline: 3M : Scottie Scheffler commits to 2026 3M Open
summary: Scottie Scheffler, the world's No. 1-ranked golfer, will compete in the 2026 3M Open. The event runs July 20-26 at TPC Twin Cities in Blaine, Minnesota. It will be Scheffler's first appearance at...
